---
title: "Lecture 01: Introduction - A Roadmap to Autonomous Robotic Systems"
---

## What is a Robot?

::: {#def-robot name="Robot"}
<br>
A robot is a physically embodied, programmable system that:<br>
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; 1. acquires information from its environment through **sensors**,<br>
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; 2. computes or plans desired actions, and<br>
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; 3. executes those actions through **actuators**<br> 
to achieve specified task objectives.

:::

::: {#def-articulated-robot name="Articulated Robot"}
<br>
An articulated robot is a robot composed of **rigid links** connected by **joints**.
:::
